html_content:
Biome Official Website Review

If you have ever felt like you do everything right and the scale still refuses to move, you are not alone. A new wave of gut-microbiome research suggests the missing piece may not be willpower at all, but the balance of bacteria living in your gut. That is exactly the idea behind Biome, a probiotic-based supplement from Lean for Good.

In this Biome review, we break down what the formula is, how it works, what is inside it, the real pricing, the guarantee, and whether Biome is worth ordering from the official website.

Why Choose Biome?

Biome takes a different angle from typical fat burners. Instead of loading you up with stimulants, it focuses on rebalancing your gut microbiome with what the makers call "lean bacteria" species.

The pitch is simple: studies on identical twins found that leaner people tend to have a more diverse gut packed with helpful bacteria, while heavier people often have a less diverse gut dominated by fewer strains. Biome aims to help shift that balance.

Here is why so many people give Biome a look:

It uses nine clinically researched lean bacteria species combined with Greenselect Phytosome, a caffeine-free green tea extract. It is vegan-friendly and free from gluten, dairy, soy, nuts, crustaceans, GMOs, and BPAs. It is made in the USA in an FDA-inspected, GMP-certified facility. And every order is protected by a generous 180-day money-back guarantee.

For anyone who suspects their gut, not their discipline, is the real obstacle, Biome is a refreshingly different option.

Order Biome From Official Website

What Is Biome?

Biome is a daily capsule-based supplement created by Lean for Good, founded by a woman named Meghan who says she struggled with sudden, unexplained weight gain herself.

According to the official website, Biome's proprietary formula is the first in the world to combine nine clinically researched lean bacteria species with Greenselect Phytosome, a next-generation, caffeine-free green tea extract that uses patented, absorption-boosting Phytosome technology.

The goal of Biome is to help reverse what the company describes as a bacterial imbalance in your gut microbiome, which it points to as a root cause of stubborn belly fat and unexplained weight gain.

Each Biome capsule is delivered in patented DRcaps delayed-release capsules. The delayed-release coating is designed to protect the living bacteria from stomach acid so more of them survive and reach your gut intact, where they can actually go to work.

In short, Biome is positioned as a gut-first approach to healthy weight management rather than a quick-fix diet pill.

How Does Biome Work?

The thinking behind Biome centers on the gut microbiome, the trillions of bacteria living in your digestive system.

The company highlights research, including a large King's College London twin study, suggesting that leaner individuals carry a rich, diverse mix of lean bacteria. These helpful species are associated with helping to suppress hunger, dampen cravings, support a healthy metabolism, and reduce fat storage.

On the flip side, a gut dominated by fewer, less helpful strains is linked with stronger hunger, more cravings, a sluggish metabolism, and increased fat storage.

Biome works by reseeding your gut with nine lean bacteria species, while the Greenselect Phytosome green tea extract supports metabolism and fat metabolism. Together, the formula is designed to tip your internal balance back toward the "naturally lean" side.

Because the bacteria in Biome are living organisms, the DRcaps delayed-release capsule is a key part of how it works. It acts like an armored car, shielding the bacteria through the harsh stomach environment so they can be released where they matter most. Over time, and with consistent daily use, Biome aims to help your gut do more of the heavy lifting for you.

Key Ingredients In Biome

Biome keeps its formula focused on a handful of well-studied components rather than a long, cluttered label. Here are the standouts.

Lactobacillus Gasseri: A lean bacteria species featured in a 12-week clinical trial published in the British Journal of Nutrition involving 210 overweight volunteers. The group taking L. Gasseri saw meaningful reductions in belly fat, body weight, BMI, and waist size compared with the placebo group.

Lactobacillus Rhamnosus: Another well-researched strain studied for its role in supporting weight management, particularly in women, in research also published in the British Journal of Nutrition.

Lactobacillus Fermentum: A third headline probiotic strain included to help support a balanced, diverse gut microbiome.

Nine lean bacteria species in total: Biome combines the strains above with additional clinically researched species to help repopulate and diversify your gut.

Greenselect Phytosome: A caffeine-free green tea extract built with patented Phytosome absorption technology, included to support metabolism and fat metabolism without the jitters of caffeine.

Sphaeranthus indicus and Garcinia mangostana: Plant-based ingredients studied for their potential to support fat reduction and weight management.

Inulin: A prebiotic dietary fiber that helps feed the beneficial bacteria, supporting their survival and activity once they reach your gut.

Every ingredient in Biome is delivered in a vegan-friendly, non-GMO capsule produced in a USA-based, FDA-inspected, GMP-certified facility.

Benefits Of Biome

Based on the official website and the research it cites, here is what users hope to experience with consistent Biome use:

Support for healthy, sustainable weight management by addressing the gut microbiome. Help curbing hunger and reducing the cravings that derail so many diets. Support for a healthy metabolism so your body works with you, not against you. A formula that targets what the company calls a root cause, rather than masking symptoms with stimulants.

Beyond weight, many people are simply drawn to the idea of a healthier, more balanced gut. A well-supported microbiome is associated with better digestion and overall wellbeing, so the appeal of Biome often goes beyond the number on the scale.

It is worth being realistic: Biome is a supplement, not a magic pill. Results vary from person to person, and the company itself notes that the longer you take it, the better the balance you are likely to build. Pairing Biome with sensible eating and movement only helps.

Order Biome From Official Website

Real Customer Reviews Of Biome

Customer feedback shared around Biome and the Lean for Good brand tends to focus on two themes: easier weight management and improved energy.

One frequently cited reviewer described losing weight more easily while also feeling much healthier and full of energy. Another shared a dramatic story of starting at over 300 pounds and going on to shed around 50 pounds with regular use.

Other users mention appreciating that Biome does not rely on harsh stimulants, so they do not get the crash or jitters that come with many weight-loss products. The vegan-friendly, allergen-conscious formula is another point reviewers bring up positively.

As with any supplement, experiences differ. Some people notice changes within a few weeks, while others need a few months of consistent use before they feel Biome is working for them. The 180-day guarantee exists precisely so you can take that time without financial pressure.

How To Use Biome

Using Biome is refreshingly simple, which is a big part of its appeal.

Take Biome daily as directed on the label, ideally as part of a consistent morning routine so you do not forget. The DRcaps delayed-release capsules are designed to be easy to swallow and to protect the living bacteria on their way to your gut.

For best results, the makers recommend taking Biome consistently over time. The clinical trials behind the key ingredients ran for around 90 days, and the company notes that benefits tended to build the longer participants continued, which is why many customers choose the 3-bottle or 6-bottle packages.

If you order a 3-month or 6-month supply, you can also pair Biome with the free bonus smoothie recipes to help support your gut and accelerate your routine. As always, follow the label and check with your healthcare provider if you have questions about whether Biome is right for you.

Pricing And Package Options

Biome is sold exclusively through the official website, and pricing drops significantly when you choose a larger package. Here is the current breakdown.

1 Bottle (1-Month Supply): $69 per bottle, total $69.00, plus $9.95 USA shipping.

3 Bottles (3-Month Supply): $59 per bottle, total $177.00, plus $9.95 USA shipping. Includes 2 free bonuses.

6 Bottles (6-Month Supply): $39 per bottle, total $234.00, with free USA shipping. Includes 2 free bonuses and is the best per-bottle value.

The 6-bottle package of Biome is the most popular option because it offers the lowest per-bottle price, free shipping, the free bonuses, and enough supply to give the formula real time to work. Every order is a one-time payment with no subscriptions or hidden charges.

As a bonus, ordering a 3 or 6-month supply of Biome unlocks free gut-friendly recipe eBooks, including 21 smoothie recipes designed to support faster results.

Order Biome From Official Website

180-Day Money Back Guarantee

One of the most reassuring things about Biome is its 180-day "empty bottle" money-back guarantee.

That means you get a full six months to try Biome for yourself, completely risk-free, no matter which package you choose. If you change your mind for any reason, you simply contact the friendly Lean for Good customer support team and they will refund 100% of your purchase price, no questions asked.

What makes this guarantee stand out is that it applies even if you have used the entire supply. You can finish every last capsule and still request a full refund within the 180-day window. Contact details are provided right on the packaging.

With six months of protection, there is genuinely very little risk in giving Biome a fair test.

Pros And Cons Of Biome

Pros:

Targets the gut microbiome, a research-backed factor in weight management. Combines nine lean bacteria species with Greenselect Phytosome green tea extract. Caffeine-free, so no jitters or crash. Vegan-friendly and free from gluten, dairy, soy, nuts, crustaceans, GMOs, and BPAs. Uses DRcaps delayed-release capsules to protect the live bacteria. Made in the USA in an FDA-inspected, GMP-certified facility. Strong 180-day empty-bottle money-back guarantee. Free bonus eBooks with multi-bottle orders. One-time payment with no subscriptions.

Cons:

Only available through the official website, not in stores or on Amazon. Results vary and may take consistent use over several months. Single-bottle pricing is higher per bottle, so the best value requires a larger upfront order. As a supplement, it works best alongside healthy eating and activity.

Limited Time Special Offer – Act Now

Biome is currently offered at heavily discounted bundle pricing through the official website, with the 6-bottle package bringing the cost down to just $39 per bottle plus free USA shipping.

The company notes that this special pricing is available for a limited time and that popular packages can sell out as stock moves quickly. Because Biome is a one-time payment with a 180-day guarantee, locking in a multi-month supply now is the smart way to secure both the lowest price and the free bonuses.

If becoming naturally lean from the inside out sounds like the approach you have been missing, there is no better moment to start than today.

Frequently Asked Questions About Biome

What is Biome used for?

Biome is a daily supplement designed to support healthy weight management by helping to rebalance the gut microbiome with lean bacteria and a caffeine-free green tea extract.

How do I take Biome?

Take Biome daily as directed on the label. Many users make it part of their morning routine and take it consistently for best results over time.

Does Biome contain caffeine?

No. Biome uses Greenselect Phytosome, a caffeine-free green tea extract, so you get the support without the jitters or crash associated with stimulants.

Is Biome suitable for vegans and people with allergies?

Yes. Biome is vegan-friendly and free from gluten, dairy, soy, nuts, crustaceans, GMOs, and BPAs. If you have specific concerns, check the label and consult your healthcare provider.

How long does it take to see results with Biome?

Results vary. Some people notice changes within a few weeks, while others need a few months of consistent use. The key clinical research ran around 90 days, and benefits tended to build over time.

Where can I buy Biome?

Biome is available exclusively through the official website. It is not sold in stores, and the company warns about copycat products on third-party platforms.

Is there a money-back guarantee on Biome?

Yes. Biome comes with a 180-day empty-bottle money-back guarantee, so you can request a full refund within six months even if you have used the entire supply.

Are there any bonuses with Biome?

Yes. Ordering a 3 or 6-month supply of Biome unlocks free gut-friendly recipe eBooks, including 21 smoothie recipes designed to support faster results.

Is Biome a subscription?

No. Every Biome order is a one-time payment. There are no subscriptions, recurring charges, or hidden fees.

Is Biome safe?

Biome is made in the USA in an FDA-inspected, GMP-certified facility using a vegan-friendly, non-GMO formula. If you are pregnant, nursing, taking medication, or have a medical condition, talk to your healthcare provider before use.

Final Verdict: Is Biome Worth It?

If you are tired of stimulant-heavy fat burners and crash diets, Biome offers a genuinely different, gut-first approach to weight management. It combines nine clinically researched lean bacteria species with a caffeine-free green tea extract, delivered in protective delayed-release capsules and made in a quality USA facility.

Add in the vegan-friendly formula, the free bonus eBooks on multi-bottle orders, and a no-nonsense 180-day empty-bottle guarantee, and Biome becomes a low-risk way to test whether rebalancing your gut is the missing piece for you.

Results will always vary, and Biome works best with consistent use and sensible habits. But given the six-month money-back guarantee, the downside is minimal and the potential upside, becoming naturally lean from the inside out, is well worth a try.

For most people exploring gut-based weight support, Biome earns a confident recommendation.
